narrative:
Upper F (precinct in Wyandot County) has 839 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.2 percentage points.
